_comment: Template for Claude Code. Copy this file to `.mcp.json` at the ROOT of your own project so Claude Code auto-loads it. The filename here deliberately omits the leading dot so this template is not itself auto-loaded when someone opens this directory in Claude Code. The key under mcpServers (`trino`) determines the tool prefix Claude Code sees: tools appear as mcp__trino__<name>. The trino-query sub-agent's `tools:` list must match that prefix. TRINO_USER / TRINO_PASSWORD are forwarded from the host shell via `-e VAR` (no `=value`), so secrets stay out of this file.
